meaning: n.可中止,可悬挂,悬而不决
examples: The mixture was then stirred for 90 seconds and transferred quantitatively to a suspensibility cylinder.
The suspensibility to seed clothing agent in compound system of naphthalene sulfonate condensate and nonionic surfactant was studied.
Its chief suspensibility can be raised to 70% from 34%, because of using airstream comminution process instead of conventional Raymond mill, and selecting suitable adjuvants.
